# Running (cumulative) sum within a partition, ordered by time

**Dataset**: `guardian_xql_lab` (composite/array lookup lab)

A running total per partition: `windowcomp sum(bytes_out) by host sort asc event_epoch as running_out`. The `sort` inside windowcomp defines the cumulative order WITHIN each `host` partition, and again `as running_out` is the LAST clause. Each row shows the sum of its partition up to and including that row (SQL `SUM(x) OVER (PARTITION BY host ORDER BY t)`). Drop the `sort` to get the partition grand total on every row instead of a running one.

```sql
dataset = guardian_xql_lab
| windowcomp sum(bytes_out) by host sort asc event_epoch as running_out
| fields host, username, bytes_out, running_out, event_epoch
| sort asc host, asc event_epoch
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant; measured cost ~0.0003 CU against a 10-row lookup (data scanned, not query complexity, drives CU)._
